title: prunus × lannesiana subf. plena
intro: Prunus × lannesiana subf. plena, also known as the double-flowering cherry, is a hybrid plant species belonging to the Prunus genus. It is often used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, such as lowering cholesterol levels, reducing blood pressure, and exhibiting anti-cancer properties. The herbal preparations of Prunus × lannesiana subf. plena include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat various ailments and promote overall well-being.
